_description: What depends on what. CHECK THIS BEFORE DELETING OR MODIFYING ANYTHING.

critical_mappings.note: Scheduler dispatches jobs BY NAME. If job name missing from jobs.json, that research topic produces nothing.
Same pattern as overnight. Maps job names to display names.
Reads needs_repair flag and failed job list from cycle reporter
Reads feed entries, writes scores to feed-quality-scores.jsonl
Reads both via claude -p, writes daily-synthesis.md and research-priorities.md
Reads all to build dashboard data, pushes to GitHub every 5min
MUST restart gateway after changes to either file. Also purge sessions.
Local models limited to 6 tools. NEVER give full 24-tool set. Write tool REMOVED.
Tailscale funnel proxies 443→8100. Launchd auto-restarts. MCP watchdog every 5min.
Scorer reads deduped ledger + prices. Outputs ct-scores.json. TICKER_TO_LEDGER maps SLV→XAGUSD. PORTFOLIO_STATUS dict defines active/planned/discovery.
Dashboard fetches from ct-server.py:3336. Three sections: Active/Planned/Discovery. Auto-refresh 60s.

critical_mappings.depends_on: camel-yt-pipeline-v2 must use entity_map for future ingestion
critical_mappings.note: Entity map collapses 81 raw names to 11 canonical. Pipeline v2 needs integration to write canonical tickers on ingest. Without this, new videos will re-create junk entries.
HTTP crawler using Chrome cookies. Seed URLs updated 3/2 to match actual FluentCommunity site structure. Never fully executed - 0 pages crawled.

REST API at /wp-json/fluent-community/v2/feeds?space={slug}. 7 spaces: indicatorupdates, productupdates, tatalk, indicatorfeedback, indicatorquestions, macroquestions, resourceroom. All accessible. Educational/framework content, not live signals.

Running since 2/25. Zero real alerts in TradingView - only 1 test curl signal. 18 alert payloads pre-built in tv-alert-payloads.txt. Playwright automation failed - need Claude in Chrome to create TV alerts.
Playwright-based alert creator. BROKEN: fails to open alert dialog on TradingView UI. Needs selector fixes or replacement with Claude in Chrome approach.

file_relationships.~/.openclaw/openclaw.json: Gateway config. Models, tools, byProvider restrictions. Gateway restart required after changes.
file_relationships.~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json: All OpenClaw cron jobs. Scheduler maps job names to UUIDs. Gateway restart required after changes.
file_relationships.~/zeke-scheduler.py: Main orchestrator. Runs overnight/daytime/reason windows. DO NOT patch incrementally — rewrite sections completely.
file_relationships.~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/learning-fe: THE critical file. 1174 entries. NEVER overwrite. Append only via exec >>.
file_relationships.~/zeke-status/: Dashboard data. Pushed to GitHub every 5min. Memory system lives here too.
file_relationships.~/zeke-portfolio/camel-twin/: Camel Twin dashboard+scorer. ct-server.py:3336, ct-confluence-scorer.py, ct-scores.json. Depends on deduped thesis ledger (11 tickers) + latest_prices.json.
file_relationships.~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/camel-thesi: Thesis ledger. DEDUPED 3/2: 11 canonical instruments + macro_context + entity_map. Pipeline v2 writes here. Scorer reads here.

openclaw_cron_jobs.note: L2 rebuild on 2/26 broke all research jobs by using wrong field names
